channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Muhimbili Orthopaedic Institute Clarifies Amputation Cases Among Bodaboda Riders
item.description: The Muhimbili Orthopaedic Institute (MOI) has responded to misconceptions about its practices involving bodaboda (motorcycle taxi) accident victims. Dr. Mpoki Ulisubisya, the MOI director, explained t...

item.title: NAPS Partners with SmartPay Finance to Launch Paytogeda Initiative for Polytechnic Students' Financial Inclusion
item.description: The Senate leadership of the National Association of Polytechnic Students (NAPS) has entered into a partnership with SmartPay Finance and Holdings Limited to introduce the Paytogeda Initiative, a fint...

item.title: US Deputy Secretary Christopher Landau to discuss trade and Indo-Pacific cooperation during India visit
item.description: United States Deputy Secretary of State Christopher Landau is set to visit India to lead the US delegation at the Raisina Dialogue 2026 in New Delhi. The annual geopolitical conference is organised by...

item.title: British Tourists in Doha and Dubai Stranded Amid Missile Strikes and Evacuations
item.description: As the conflict in the Middle East escalates, British tourists stranded in Doha and Dubai have shared harrowing accounts of missile strikes and chaotic evacuations. Over 300,000 Britons are believed t...

item.title: Guidelines for Resigning Professionally and Handling Counteroffers
item.description: Resigning from a job can be an emotional and awkward process, as it involves stepping away from relationships, routines, and a familiar way of life. Shane Little, Managing Director at Hays Asia Pacifi...

item.title: Davido Facing ₦1B Lawsuit Over Defamation and Cyberbullying Allegations
item.description: Davido is currently facing a ₦1 billion lawsuit filed by Sophie Momodu’s lawyer, Mrs. Ebelechukwu Egeonu Enedah. The suit follows allegations of defamation, cyberbullying, and threats to life made aga...

item.title: House panel removes offensive comment by Rep. Bong Suntay about Anne Curtis during impeachment hearing
item.description: At a House Justice Committee hearing on the impeachment complaints against Vice President Sara Duterte, Representative Bong Suntay faced backlash for making an inappropriate comment about actress Anne...

item.title: Rinsola Babajide hails WAFCON triumph as career highlight
item.description: Omorinsola Rinsola Babajide don show say football don carry her waka far, but nothing wey she don achieve reach like to lift the Women’s Africa Cup of Nations (WAFCON) trophy with Nigeria Super Falcon...

item.title: Durban mother reunites with her baby after using a baby saver
item.description: A young mother in Durban, who initially placed her newborn in a baby saver at Isiaiah 54 Children’s Sanctuary, has been reunited with her child after changing her mind. The mother returned to the sanc...

item.title: Rajasthan's Development Projects Face Criticism Over Heritage and Safety Concerns
item.description: Recent developments in Rajasthan have raised concerns regarding mismanagement and poor planning in the state's infrastructure and heritage projects. BJP MLA Vishvaraj Singh, a member of the Maharana P...

item.title: How Constant War Updates Affect Mental Health and Social Media Use
item.description: Recent missile strikes in the Persian Gulf, following US-Israel attacks in Iran, have led to widespread doomscrolling, where users compulsively consume negative news through social media feeds. This b...

item.title: Adeola Urges Supporters To Avoid Attacking Rivals Ahead of Ogun 2027 Governorship Race
item.description: Senator Solomon Adeola, representing Ogun West and the Chairman of the Senate Committee on Appropriation, has urged his supporters to stop attacking other governorship aspirants in Ogun State ahead of...

item.title: Standard Bank confirms four-year sponsorship of Safa amid ongoing fraud case against Danny Jordaan
item.description: Standard Bank has confirmed a four-year sponsorship agreement with the South African Football Association (Safa), backing all senior men’s and women’s national teams until 2030, despite the ongoing fr...

item.title: Netanyahu: US and Israel’s strikes on Iran aim to end regime, not start a prolonged war
item.description: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu reassured the public that the US and Israel's strikes against Iran would not escalate into an endless conflict. Speaking in an exclusive interview with Fox Ne...

item.title: Facing Abuse and Finding Safe Love: Jane’s Journey in ‘Love and Other Lost Things’
item.description: This novel tell story of Jane, young lady wey grow up watching her mama suffering abuse from her papa, wey happen to be a police chief. Jane tink say she go choose differently, but one night her fathe...

item.title: Protea North teacher arrested for allegedly physically assaulting Grade 11 pupil
item.description: Police in Soweto have arrested a teacher at Tetelo Secondary School in Protea North following allegations that she beat a Grade 11 pupil with a pipe, administering 92 lashes. The incident reportedly o...

item.title: How Presidential Succession Works in South Sudan Amid Delayed Elections
item.description: South Sudan never don hold any proper election since dem gain independence 15 years ago, and di progress to create new constitution don dey slow. Election dates don dey set and push back at least thre...

item.title: Koto Bolofo’s Iconic Fashion Photography Exhibit Showcases Global Impact
item.description: The renowned South African-born, UK-based fashion photographer, Koto Bolofo, is being honoured with a major exhibition in Johannesburg, celebrating his career spanning over three decades. The exhibit,...

item.title: DA and ANC Coalition Mayors: A Step Forward for Joburg's Recovery
item.description: The election of Loyiso Masuku as deputy mayor of Joburg marks a significant moment for the city's leadership. This decision, alongside DA leader Helen Zille's bid for the position of mayor, presents a...

item.title: Traffic chaos on II Chundrigar Road due to city-wide closures
item.description: Karachi's II Chundrigar Road is facing severe traffic congestion as key city roads, MT Khan Road and Mai Kolachi Road, remain closed for security reasons. The closures come in the aftermath of protest...
